Line input handling, JerryScript integration, console/log implementations, and build configuration for Zephyr.


## Files
- **[getline-zephyr.c](getline-zephyr.c.md)**: Implements line input handling for Zephyr using UART with buffer management.
- **[getline-zephyr.h](getline-zephyr.h.md)**: Header file for initializing and using a getline function in the Zephyr environment.
- **[jerry-entry.c](jerry-entry.c.md)**: Console and log message implementations for the JerryScript engine.
- **[main-zephyr.c](main-zephyr.c.md)**: Integrates JerryScript with Zephyr OS, providing a REPL for executing JavaScript commands.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Build configuration for compiling the JerryScript application on the Zephyr platform.
